ingredients.text: succo concentrato di fragola 10% sul totale

ingredients_text: Yogurt intero 80% (latte* intero pastorizzato, fermenti lattici vivi), preparato alla fragola 20% (purea di fragola* e succo concentrato di fragola* 10% sul totale, zucchero di barbabietola*, amido di mais*, addensante: farina di semi di carrube*, succo concentrato di barbabietole rosse*). Senza glutine. *da agricoltura biologica.
ingredients_text_de: Joghurt* 80%, Erdbeerzubereitung 20% (Erdbeerpüree* und Erdbeersaftkonzentrat* 10%, Rübenzucker*, Maisstärke*, Verdickungsmittel: Johannisbrotkernmehl*; Rote Beete Saftkonzentrat*). Glutenfrei. *aus biologischer Landwirtschaft.
ingredients_text_en: Yogurt* 80%, strawberry preparation (strawberry puree* and strawberry Juice concentrate* 10%, beet sugar*, cornstarch*, thickeners: locust bean gum*, beetroot juice concentrate*). Gluten-free. *organic.
ingredients_text_fr: Yogurt* 80%, strawberry preparation (strawberry puree* and strawberry Juice concentrate* 10%, beet sugar*, cornstarch*, thickeners: locust bean gum*, beetroot juice concentrate*). Gluten-free. *organic.
